solution_summary: Fix the max price filter in the flight search functionality to correctly return flights priced at or below the specified max price.
implementation_steps: Modify the filtering logic to ensure that it returns flights priced at or below the max price provided in the request.
Add unit tests to verify the corrected behavior of the max price filter.
Run existing tests to ensure no other functionality is broken.

planned_changes.change_summary: Corrected the max price filtering logic in the 'search_flights' function to return flights priced at or below the specified max price.
planned_changes.rationale: The existing implementation incorrectly filters flights, returning those priced above the max price instead of at or below it.

patch_strategy: Create a new branch based on the latest version of the main branch, implement the changes to the 'search_flights' function, and push the branch to the repository.
validation_steps: Perform unit testing on the 'search_flights' function to ensure it meets the acceptance criteria.
Manually test the flight search API endpoint with various max price values to ensure only expected flights are returned.
Review logs for any unexpected errors during the testing phase.
pr_title: Fix max price filter in flight search
pr_body: This PR fixes the issue where the max price filter in the flight search functionality incorrectly returns flights priced above the specified limit. The filter logic has been corrected, and unit tests have been added to validate the proper functionality. Acceptance criteria from the original issue have been addressed.
